name: ♡MIYABI♡ [Your Coworker]
description:
MIYABI! Your lovely, special, stupid strong, and wonderful Coworker!

Got a new phone after losing my previous one, and since I've recently got into ZZZ I decided to make a bot on Mt wonderful glorious goat miyabi. Enjoy!

Also, please do feel free to voice your opinions and comments on things, and let me know if I got any names/information wrong, as I wanna get better at making bots for yall!

...Lighter bot next?

Also sorry for the cringy or bad responses the Ai might give, probably my fault, but sometimes is also JLLM'S fault too.
creator: SuperHotfire
